# {{ site.first_name }} {{ site.last_name }} &mdash; Applied Scientist

> Ronak Pradhan is an Applied Scientist working on large language models, fine-tuning, and applied ML in production. Currently a Data Scientist Intern at **Optum** domain-adapting LLMs for healthcare reasoning. Previously an Applied Scientist Intern at **Amazon**, where his work on the `Amazon.in` product retrieval model drove a +0.4% increase in Precision @ 1% Recall, +0.2% ROC AUC, and +0.4% Cold-Start ROC AUC over a 100M+ row, terabyte-scale training set. B.Tech in Electronics &amp; Communication Engineering from Manipal Institute of Technology (2023). Available for full-time Applied Scientist / ML Engineer roles and selected consulting engagements.

This file is a Markdown index of the site for AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.). For the full long-form Markdown corpus see [/llms-full.txt]({{ '/llms-full.txt' | relative_url }}).

## Core pages

- [About / home]({{ '/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; who Ronak is, what he works on, and how to hire him.
- [Experience / case studies]({{ '/experience/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; detailed write-ups of the Amazon and Optum work, with concrete metrics.
- [Projects]({{ '/projects/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; open-source ML / LLM projects.
- [Publications]({{ '/publications/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; papers, talks, technical write-ups.
- [Notes / blog]({{ '/blog/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; applied notes on LLMs, fine-tuning, evals, and shipping ML in production.
- [CV]({{ '/cv/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; full curriculum vitae.
- [Contact]({{ '/contact/' | absolute_url }}) &mdash; contact form, Calendly intro-call link, social profiles.

## Headline facts

- **Name:** Ronak Pradhan
- **Role:** Applied Scientist (LLMs &amp; applied ML in production)
- **Currently:** Data Scientist Intern at Optum (Jan 2024 &mdash; present)
- **Previously:** Applied Scientist Intern at Amazon (Feb &mdash; Jul 2023)
- **Education:** B.Tech ECE, Manipal Institute of Technology (Sep 2023)
- **Core stack:** PyTorch, HuggingFace transformers + peft, BioClinical BERT, PySpark, AWS SageMaker, Docker, Flask
- **Quantified impact at Amazon:** +0.4% Precision @ 1% Recall, +0.2% ROC AUC, +0.4% Cold-Start ROC AUC, on 100M+ row terabyte-scale training data.
- **Quantified impact at Optum:** Significantly improved precision on a healthcare textual-entailment task; shipped a productionized async SageMaker endpoint for BioClinical BERT.
- **GitHub:** [github.com/Ronak-Pradhan](https://github.com/Ronak-Pradhan)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/ronak-pradhan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ronak-pradhan/)
- **Hire me:** Full-time roles or 4&ndash;12 week consulting via the [contact page]({{ '/contact/' | absolute_url }}).
